attributes.description: Alerts when the compaction queue depth exceeds 10 (`storage_compactions_queued >= 10`). Compaction backlog degrades read performance.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Compaction queue backlog

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB compaction queue backlog

### What fired
Per-level `storage_compactions_queued >= 10` during the window.

### Why it matters
Compaction reduces shard size and improves read performance. A growing queue means writes outpace compaction, which degrades reads and increases disk usage.

### Triage
1. Check compaction worker counts and CPU.
2. Inspect disk IOPS.
3. Look for recent write-volume spikes.

### Remediation
- Scale compaction workers.
- Upgrade storage.

### Tuning
- `>= 10` per level; tune per workload.
